summary: This is an excellent test suite that thoroughly covers all four major requirements: preview mode, conflict detection, actual renaming, and undo script generation. Coverage is comprehensive — every function is tested, including the integration workflow that validates the full rename+undo cycle end-to-end. Rigor is strong: edge cases like no-match scenarios, no-op renames (old==new), empty operation lists, multiple distinct conflicts, and WhatIf behavior are all explicitly tested. The one minor gap is limited testing of invalid inputs (e.g., malformed regex, non-existent directory) and no test for conflict behavior when Force IS specified. Design is excellent — BeforeEach/AfterEach properly isolate filesystem state with GUIDs, tests are logically grouped into Describe/Context blocks, fixtures are minimal and purposeful, and the TDD intent is clearly documented in comments. The integration test that actually executes the generated undo script is particularly valuable for catching real-world regressions. This suite would provide high confidence against regressions.
